creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
lang/python38 has packaging issues on armv6:

http://beefy8.nyi.freebsd.org/data/main-armv6-default/p562626_sb42a2ea55/logs/python38-3.8.7.log

and armv7:

http://beefy12.nyi.freebsd.org/data/130releng-armv7-quarterly/565842/logs/python38-3.8.7.log

and perhaps some sort of intermittent build issue on armv7:

http://beefy12.nyi.freebsd.org/data/main-armv7-default/p565844_s24fd63e09/logs/python38-3.8.7.log

Not sure if it should block this tho.
